Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}We're all going to Hagakure. Wanna come?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What, you on a diet or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Huh? Seriously? I didn't even think about that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Sanada-san's buying today. You remember that bet we made in Yakushima?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh, you probably forgot all about it by now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Well, you won in the end... even if it was Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But whatever, Sanada-san still lost, right? Even if it took me, like, six months to make him admit it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}C'mon, everyone else already left. We gotta jet![n]{f 1 1}
